description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a fitted long-sleeve top with a high collar and a scarf draped around the neck. He wears camouflage-patterned cargo pants tucked into sturdy, high-ankle boots, and has protective knee pads on both legs. His hands are gloved, and a crossbody strap with a pouch or small bag is slung over his shoulder, suggesting utility or readiness for activity. The figure has short, textured hair and a pendant necklace, adding to the modern, practical look. The overall appearance is that of a streetwise individual, possibly suited for urban exploration or outdoor tasks.
description: A streetwise adult male in urban casual wear with a scarf, gloves, cargo pants, boots, and utility accessories. He has short hair and a practical, ready-for-action appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the scarf, pendant, gloves, crossbody strap, pouch, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the scarf's drape, and the pouch's position on the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the strap across the back, and the rear details of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm, glove, and the side profile of the boots and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: urban casual long-sleeve top with scarf, cargo pants, gloves, and knee pads
